title: mangifera griffithii
intro: Mangifera griffithii is a species of flowering plant in the family Anacardiaceae, commonly known as the wild mango or Bengal mango. The bark and leaves of this plant have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Mangifera griffithii include the ability to reduce fever, treat digestive issues, and alleviate respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of Mangifera griffithii can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are used to treat various ailments in Ayurvedic and Unani medicine.
